user.title: Diamond Linq Water Softener
user.description: Select your Diamond Linq water softener from the list of discovered devices.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Diamond Linq water softener. You can find it in your phone's Bluetooth settings when paired with the softener.

data_description.address: The MAC address in format XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Setup
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the softener. Please check the address and ensure the device is in range.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX format.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to read the softener (2-3600s). Faster gives near-real-time flow but holds the single BLE slot continuously, so the phone app cannot connect while the integration is enabled.
